title: Introduction to LangChain
excerpt: Deep dive introduction to LangChain architecture including components such as LLM wrappers prompt templates chains agents and memory Understand how LangChain simplifies building production-ready LLM applications and explore common use cases such as chatbots document Q&A systems and AI agents.
author: Saravana Kumar

title: Setting Up LangChain with Python
excerpt: Learn how to install and configure LangChain in a professional Python environment Build your first LLM-powered application while understanding environment management API integrations model configuration and project structure for scalable AI applications.
author: Saravana Kumar

title: Understanding LLM Prompts in LangChain
excerpt: Explore prompt engineering concepts including instruction prompts system prompts contextual prompts and prompt chaining Understand how prompts influence LLM behavior and learn techniques to improve response accuracy and reduce hallucinations.
author: Saravana Kumar

title: Using Prompt Templates in LangChain
excerpt: Learn how to build reusable prompt templates using LangChain Understand dynamic variable injection prompt parameterization and structured prompts for building scalable AI workflows and reusable prompt libraries.
author: Saravana Kumar

title: Building Your First LangChain Chatbot
excerpt: Step-by-step guide to building a production-style chatbot using LangChain Learn about message history management prompt orchestration model configuration and building conversational AI applications.
author: Saravana Kumar

title: LangChain Chains Explained
excerpt: Understand how chains orchestrate multiple LLM operations together Explore SequentialChains RouterChains and custom chains to build complex AI workflows that integrate reasoning data processing and external APIs.

excerpt: Learn how conversational memory works in LangChain including buffer memory summary memory and vector memory Build AI applications capable of maintaining context across long conversations.

title: LangChain with Ollama Running LLMs Locally

excerpt: Explore the mathematics and intuition behind embeddings and vector representations Understand how embeddings enable semantic search clustering similarity search and retrieval systems in modern AI applications.
